name: no_rank_hidden_gem
description: Listings without a current sales rank but with steady review accumulation. Long-tail / low-competition plays. Volume is lower; margins should compensate.
thesis: No-rank ASINs filtered by review count + review-count growth surface low-competition products that don't show up in BSR-driven scans.
notes: noSalesRank checkbox key may need verification on first run — the skill should resolve via UI inspection and save-back to keepa-finder-values.md if the verified key differs.
Higher BUY_BOX floor (£15 vs £12 on other recipes): no-rank items have lower predicted volume so AOV needs to compensate.
totalOfferCount ≤ 5 = genuinely uncrowded; combined with review velocity proves the listing actually sells.
decide_overrides flow into 05_decide.config.overrides — relaxes the velocity floor for this strategy only (no-rank items will fail the default min_sales_shortlist = 20).
